domain: concept hierarchy and compositionality in language models

survivors.name: Category-slot detachability (is a concept's category a movable coordinate?)

concept.name: Category-slot detachability (is a concept's category a movable coordinate?)
concept.definition: For an entity concept E (e.g. apple) with taxonomic category C (fruit), the category is a SEPARABLE coordinate iff a steering intervention can swap C->C' (vegetable) while preserving E's non-category attributes (red, round, sweet, grows-on-tree). Operationalize on a small open model (gpt2-small): dir(C)=diff-in-means (fruit prompts minus grand mean) at layer L; dir(C')=diff-in-means (vegetable). Intervene on the last token of category-eliciting prompts about E ('An apple is a kind of ___', 'The category of apple is ___') by adding alpha*dir(C') and subtracting alpha*dir(C). Sweep alpha and L. Measure three numbers per (alpha,L): (a) FLIP = P(model classifies E as C') via next-token / completion; (b) PRESERVE = E's non-category attribute score (red/round/sweet still completed/probed high); (c) COHERENCE = perplexity within tol of clean.
concept.prediction: There EXISTS an (alpha,L) window where FLIP>=0.7 AND PRESERVE>=0.7 AND COHERENCE within 20% of clean baseline — a CLEAN reclassification (apple becomes 'a vegetable' yet stays red/round/sweet). This means taxonomic category is a detachable coordinate, not fused with identity. FALSIFIED if no window achieves FLIP and PRESERVE jointly (only gibberish, i.e. coherence collapses whenever FLIP rises, or FLIP never reaches 0.7). Controls: random unit vector of equal norm must NOT flip category (else we merely broke the model with noise); positive control alpha*dir(C) on E must intensify correct category (oracle).
concept.reduces_to: Activation steering / ActAdd (Turner et al. 2023) + hierarchical concept geometry (Park et al. 2024). Risk: 'steering works' restated. Earns keep ONLY by measuring clean DETACHMENT (category moves while identity attributes are preserved and coherence holds), which neither prior line tests.

test.design:
Preregistered falsification (PREREG.md + exp.py + RESULT.txt in research_cycle/experiments/category_slot/). Model gpt2, cpu, ONE intervention: last-token residual add of a category axis v = mean_resid(veg exemplars) - mean_resid(fruit exemplars), exemplars decoupled from the target (fruits banana/orange/grape/peach/mango/pear vs vegetables carrot/potato/broccoli/onion/celery/spinach). Target = "apple". Grid L in {6,8,10} x alpha in {2,4,6,8}. Metrics on apple: FLIP = fraction of 6 category probes where clean prefers ' fruit' (logitdiff<0) and steered flips to ' vegetable' (logitdiff>0); PRESERVE = fraction of 5 identity probes whose argmax-within-candidate-set (red/round/sweet/juicy/tree) stays == clean; COHERENCE = mean next-token entropy on 6 neutral non-food prompts under the same hook, within 20% band 0.8-1.2 of clean. Frozen decision rule: BROKEN if oracle<1.0 logit; SUPPORTED if some (L,alpha) hits FLIP>=0.7 AND PRESERVE>=0.7 AND coherence-in-band AND random-control FLIP<0.5 AND oracle passes; REFUTED if oracle passes but no config meets FLIP&PRESERVE jointly in band.</design>
<parameter name="numbers">Clean sanity: apple category logitdiff mean -1.11 (5/6 probes prefer 'fruit') so a flip is meaningful. Winning windows: L=8 a=6 -> FLIP 0.83, PRES 0.80, cohR 0.99; L=10 a=2 -> FLIP 0.83, PRES 1.00, cohR 1.00 (cleanest). FLIP ceiling is 5/6=0.83 because one probe is already veg-leaning at baseline. PRESERVE is a live metric: at L=10 a=8 it drops to 0.60 (overdrive breaks identity). Coherence essentially untouched everywhere (cohR 0.99-1.05).
test.sanity: Oracle PASSES strongly: adding +veg-direction to REAL vegetables' category probes intensifies the correct category by up to +5.06 logit (already +0.97..+2.74 at moderate alpha), well above min_oracle 1.0 — the measurement pipeline works (guards the .norm-bug class). Random control PASSES: a gaussian unit vector of the SAME norm at the winning L=8/a=6 gives FLIP 0.00 (PRES 0.80, cohR 0.92) — the flip is direction-specific, not noise breaking the model.

survivors.name: Causal hierarchy containment (does ablating the parent knock out membership but spare identity?)

concept.name: Causal hierarchy containment (does ablating the parent knock out membership but spare identity?)
concept.definition: If child concept E (apple) is stored as parent-category component (fruit) PLUS a child-specific residual, then projecting the parent direction OUT of the residual stream should remove E's parent-membership while preserving E's identity attributes. Operationalize (gpt2-small): dir(fruit)=diff-in-means; on apple prompts, ablate by projecting dir(fruit) out at layer L (resid -= (resid.u)u). Measure MEMBERSHIP = drop in 'apple is a fruit' logit/completion, and IDENTITY = change in 'apple is red / round / grows on a tree' scores.
concept.prediction: Fruit-ablation drops MEMBERSHIP by a large margin while IDENTITY drops far less: specifically membership-drop >= 3x identity-drop, and identity stays above 0.6 of clean. This is causal evidence apple is represented as fruit-component + independent identity. FALSIFIED if identity falls as much as membership (concept is monolithic, category not separable) or if membership barely moves (ablation ineffective -> BROKEN_MEASUREMENT, check oracle: ablating dir(fruit) must reduce fruit-classification of a KNOWN fruit).
concept.reduces_to: Activation patching / ablation + hierarchical geometry (Park et al.). Earns keep as a CAUSAL containment test (ablate parent, watch child membership vs identity dissociate) rather than the correlational 'child vector lies near parent subspace' geometry claim.

test.design: Ran a preregistered ablation test on gpt2 (CPU). ONE intervention: project the `fruit` direction — diff-in-means of fruit vs vegetable exemplars, DECOUPLED from the target apple — out of resid_post at all positions of layer L (rank-1 projection, no magnitude knob). Metrics on apple only: MEMBERSHIP = fruit-vs-veg probability P(fruit)/(P(fruit)+P(veg)) over 6 "apple is a type of" probes; IDENTITY = candidate-normalised retention of the model's own clean answers over 5 property probes (color/shape/taste/texture/grows-on). Frozen decision rule read at L* = argmax-oracle layer among {4,6,8,10} (layer chosen by ablation efficacy, NOT by result): SUPPORTED iff oracle>=1.0 logit AND membership_drop>=0.10 AND membership_drop>=3*identity_drop AND identity_retained>=0.6; REFUTED(monolithic) if identity falls comparably or retained<0.6; REFUTED(target-inert) if membership barely moves though oracle works; BROKEN_MEASUREMENT if oracle<1.0. Files: /home/friemann/workspace/repos-demidovz/maevtica/research_cycle/experiments/hierarchy_containment/{PREREG.md,exp.py,RESULT.txt}.
test.numbers: At frozen L*=4: apple membership fruit-pref 0.718 -> 0.016 (membership_drop = +0.98, a 98% relative knockout); identity 0.658 -> 0.600 (identity_drop = +0.09, identity_retained = 0.91); coherence ratio 1.00. Rule check: 0.98 >= 3 x 0.09 (=0.27) and 0.91 >= 0.6 -> SUPPORTED. Pattern replicates at L=10 (md=+0.88, idd=-0.06, identity actually rises). At L6/L8 the axis is not linearly ablatable (oracle ~0), so no effect there.
test.sanity: Oracle (positive control, decoupled): the SAME ablation drops fruit-logit on KNOWN non-apple fruits (banana/orange/grape/peach) by +3.32 logit at L*=4 — far above min_oracle 1.0, so the measurement genuinely works (not a near-zero/.norm-bug failure). Second control: random rank-1 direction ablation at L4 over 5 seeds gives membership_drop mean +0.001 / max +0.035 vs the fruit-direction's +0.98 — the knockout is direction-specific, not generic layer damage. Clean baseline M0=0.72>0.5 confirms gpt2 knows apple=fruit, so the knockout is meaningful.

survivors.name: Width-Persistent Latent (renormalization fixed point across dictionary width)

concept.name: Width-Persistent Latent (renormalization fixed point across dictionary width)
concept.definition: Train an SAE ensemble at geometrically increasing widths W1<W2<...<Wk on the same activations. Between adjacent widths, match latents by their firing-extension overlap (Jaccard of the token/context sets on which they activate above threshold) plus decoder-direction cosine, solved as a linear assignment. A latent's PERSISTENCE = the length of the contiguous width-interval over which it maps 1:1 with no split (one parent -> many children), no merge, and extension drift < epsilon. A 'concept' is an equivalence class of matched latents with persistence >= tau. Scale-invariance is built in: the unit is the matched track across widths, not the latent at one width.
concept.prediction: Computable holdout test: estimate persistence from W1..W4, hold out W5. Latents in the top persistence quartile absorb/split at W5 at least 2x less often than the bottom quartile (AUC of persistence -> survival significantly > 0.5). If persistence carries no predictive signal for which latents split/absorb at the next width, the representation is dead.
concept.reduces_to: Cross-width / cross-seed feature matching and 'feature universality'; Matryoshka-SAE level consistency; RG fixed points. Risk: it is 'universality measured across widths' with an RG label.

test.design:
Preregistered (frozen in PREREG.md before running): train ReLU-L1 SAEs on gpt2 L6 resid activations at width ladder [128,192,288,432,648]; latent=unit decoder direction, match=max cosine. Anchor W1=128; persistence=mean max-cos to W2/W3/W4, survival c5=max-cos to held-out W5=648. Metric A: AUC(persistence->survives@tau=0.5). Metric B: split/absorb rate bottom vs top persistence quartile. Decision rule: oracle<0.30->BROKEN; base-rate<8%/>92%->INCONCLUSIVE; AUC>=0.60 AND bottomQ>=2xtopQ->SUPPORTED; AUC<=0.55->REFUTED.</design>
<parameter name="numbers">AUC(persistence->survival)=0.904 (tau=0.5); tau-free median-split AUC=0.973. Top persistence quartile split/absorb rate=0.000 at every tau 0.50-0.75; bottom quartile 0.219->1.000 (ratio infinity, >>2x). SAE L0 grows 12->34 with width (feature-splitting signature), FVE 0.94-0.96. Frozen rule returned INCONCLUSIVE ONLY because tau=0.5 overall split rate 6.2% tripped the <8% base-rate gate (threshold placement, not weak signal); effect holds at all taus. Runtime ~60s CPU.
test.sanity: Oracle PASSED: two independently-seeded SAEs at same width(192) match at mean cosine 0.403 vs random-direction control 0.100 (gate 0.30). Negative control: shuffled-label AUC=0.505 (AUC code honest). Oracle first CAUGHT A REAL BUG: initial weak l1 gave dense near-PCA SAEs (L0~=m, oracle 0.18) that would have faked AUC=0.928; rescaling activations to mean-norm sqrt(d) + l1=1.0 produced sparse reproducible dicts and lifted oracle to 0.403. Verdict reported only past passing oracle.

concept.name: Causally-Conserved Concept (output-grounded, reconstruction-free unit)
concept.definition: Ground the unit in downstream causal effect rather than reconstruction. For a direction v, define its causal signature as the change in the model's next-token distribution under steering h -> h + alpha*v, measured as KL over a fixed probe set. A concept is a v that (i) has large causal signature and (ii) whose signature is INVARIANT across the different-width SAEs that each contain a latent within cosine theta of v. Reality is defined by a measurement instrument (causal patching) that is independent of the SAE reconstruction objective, breaking the circularity where the dictionary both defines and measures the feature.
concept.prediction: Causal-effect conservation under splitting: when a parent latent at width W splits into daughters at width 2W, the vector sum of the daughters' KL-steering signatures reconstructs the parent's signature within tolerance, even though each daughter's per-latent reconstruction share varies wildly. Falsified if daughter causal signatures fail to sum to the parent (i.e. causal effect is as width-dependent as reconstruction share), computable by measuring steering KL of parent vs. daughter set.
concept.reduces_to: Causal mediation / activation patching, distributed alignment search (DAS), 'functional features'. Risk: it is 'a causal feature' with a conservation-law framing bolted on.

test.design: Preregistered (PREREG.md, frozen before running). Train two ReLU-L1 SAEs on the same gpt2 L6 activations: parent W=128, daughters 2W=256. Assign each daughter to its nearest parent by decoder cosine (feature-splitting picture); a "split" = parent with >=2 daughters (89 of them). Steering signature s(d) = mean over 12 fixed probes of the logit-delta vector (steered - clean) from adding alpha*(unit decoder dir) to resid_post L6, alpha=0.5*mean_resid_norm=45; every latent steered at EQUAL magnitude so the sum ignores reconstruction share (strong form). PRIMARY metric = Delta = median cos(daughter-sum-signature, own parent signature) minus median cos to RANDOM other parents (specificity control removing the generic common-component confound). FROZEN RULE: oracle(a) median parent KL>=0.02 AND oracle(b) split-half signature cosine>=0.30 else BROKEN_MEASUREMENT; then #splits<8 -> INCONCLUSIVE; then cos_true>=0.50 AND Delta>=0.15 -> SUPPORTED; Delta<=0.05 -> REFUTED; else INCONCLUSIVE.
test.numbers: SUPPORTED. median cos(daughter-sum, own parent) = 0.828; median cos to random parent = 0.176; Delta = 0.652 (thresholds 0.50 / 0.15). Geometric-only control cos(sum decoder dirs, parent dir) = 0.742, so causal signature adds only +0.086 over pure geometry; the strong non-trivial part is the specificity Delta=0.652. Premise contrast weak: reconstruction-share CV within a parent = 0.18 (moderate, not "wild"). SAEs: parent L0=12.1 FVE=0.941, daughters L0=18.1 FVE=0.949.
test.sanity: Oracle earned its keep. v1 returned BROKEN_MEASUREMENT (parent KL=0.003) — the gate caught a real magnitude bug in my harness: latents were steered at norm ~7 (I used `scale`) while the random control used norm ~45 (`alpha`), a ~6x mismatch, the exact .norm-class error the protocol guards against. After fixing to a consistent norm-45 for parents/daughters/control: oracle(a) median parent-steer KL=0.242 nats (>> 0.02 floor, and 2x the random-dir 0.121 nats, so latent dirs perturb the output MORE than random), and oracle(b) split-half signature cosine=0.823 (>> 0.30 — signatures reproduce across independent probe halves, i.e. real signal not noise). Both pass; measurement verified working.

concept.name: Order-Invariant Concept (implication-lattice edge, not node)
concept.definition: Declare the atomic-node assumption wrong and take the invariant to be the partial order. Build a formal context: objects = tokens/contexts, attributes = latents firing above threshold. At each width compute the implication basis (Horn clauses A_fires => B_fires over extension sets). The 'stable concept structure' is the set of implications holding across a width range. Absorption is then not loss of a concept but replacement of a direct firing by an implication edge: when a narrow 'lion' latent swallows the general 'starts-with-L' firing on lion tokens, the relation 'lion => starts-with-L' persists as a new edge, conserving the transitive closure.
concept.prediction: Computable: the implication-basis Jaccard across widths exceeds the node-set (latent inventory) Jaccard across widths by a clear margin, and every documented absorption event corresponds to a direct-firing edge being replaced by a daughter=>parent implication edge that preserves the transitive closure. Falsified if node stability >= implication stability, or if absorption breaks (does not merely re-route) the closure.
concept.reduces_to: Formal Concept Analysis / concept lattices; meta-SAE hierarchical decomposition; feature co-occurrence graphs. Risk: it is FCA applied to SAE latents, renamed.

test.design: still in backlog at run end — seed the next run with it

concept.name: MDL-Canonical Latent (rate-distortion optimal dictionary count)
concept.definition: Remove the 'count is whatever dictionary you trained' problem by making width data-determined, not analyst-chosen. Define the concept inventory as the dictionary at width W* minimizing total description length = bits to encode the codes (L0 * code entropy) + bits to encode the reconstruction residual under a fixed noise model. A 'concept' is a latent present in the W*-dictionary. The number of concepts becomes a property of the activation distribution plus a stated coding cost, not of the arbitrary width knob.
concept.prediction: Computable and non-trivial: a combined absorption+splitting rate, measured as a function of width on real model activations, is NON-monotonic with an interior minimum, and that minimum coincides (within tolerance) with the MDL / rate-distortion knee. Falsified if absorption+splitting rises monotonically with width with no interior minimum, or if the MDL curve has no interior optimum on real activations (i.e. no canonical count exists).
concept.reduces_to: Minimum description length / rate-distortion coding; L0-vs-reconstruction Pareto-knee selection; Matryoshka / BatchTopK principled-width choice. Risk: it is 'pick the width at the MDL knee', a width-selection heuristic dressed as a concept.

test.design: still in backlog at run end — seed the next run with it

controls.notes:
Calibration of this campaign's adversary+historian bar (cycle.workflow.js: schemas S_ADV L59-61 / S_HIST L62-65, prompts L79-80, gate L137-143), domain "concept hierarchy and compositionality in language models". 2 known-real + 2 planted-distractor concepts run through the same judges + gate. Consistent in method with the prior mechinterp CONTROL (campaigns/night-2026-07-04/run1_final.json, also trustworthy).

Gate recap: SURVIVES iff clearlyNovel (adv.survives && !adv.is_rename && !hist.is_rediscovery) OR separable (hist.separable_prediction===true); else KILLED. The gate is deliberately permissive — separable_prediction is the load-bearing discriminator.

KNOWN-GOOD (both PASSED, as expected):
- Hierarchical linear concept geometry (Park et al. 2024: is-a encoded as orthogonality between parent dir and child-within-parent dir; taxonomy=polytope). adv: survives=T, is_rename=F. hist: is_rediscovery=T (extends linear-representation hypothesis), separable_prediction=T (orthogonality-encodes-hierarchy is a divergent, experiment-adjudicable claim beyond "concepts are linear"). Gate: separable -> SURVIVES. ✓
- Compositional vector additivity (composed meaning ≈ sum of constituent feature directions; additive causal steering of internal/SAE features; red-dir + car-dir -> "red car"). adv: survives=T, is_rename=F. hist: is_rediscovery=T (word2vec/linear rep), separable_prediction=T (additivity diverges from a nonlinear/multiplicative-binding baseline; falsifiable). Gate: separable -> SURVIVES; robust even if a harsh adversary flips is_rename=T. ✓

DISTRACTORS (both KILLED, as expected):
- "Semantic gravity" (abstract/central concepts 'pull' related ones into orbit): vague metaphor, no operational definition, no failure boundary = embedding hubness/centrality-clustering restated. adv: survives=F, is_rename=T. hist: is_rediscovery=T, separable_prediction=F. Gate -> KILLED. ✓
- "Contextual meaning vector" (each token's meaning is a context-dependent vector) = contextual embedding / hidden state (ELMo/BERT 2018) renamed; prediction identical to prior art. adv: survives=F, is_rename=T. hist: is_rediscovery=T, separable_prediction=F. Gate -> KILLED. ✓

VERDICT: 2/2 known-good passed, 2/2 distractors killed. The judges discriminate on this domain. Note: the discrimination rests entirely on the historian's separable_prediction flag (the permissive OR-gate). It fired correctly here (T for both real concepts, F for both distractors), so verdicts are trustworthy — but the campaign's safety margin is only as good as that one flag; a charitable historian granting separable_prediction to a rename would leak it through unchecked by the adversary.

journal.domain: concept hierarchy and compositionality in language models
seenStress: Taxonomic hierarchy of concepts (fruit > apple): is category membership a separable, movable coordinate or fused with entity identity? Park et al. 2024 map the geometry; the CAUSAL detachability question is open.
The word "feature" as the atomic unit of a concept (linear representation hypothesis: one concept = one direction), operationalized by SAE dictionary elements.

stress.where: The word "feature" as the atomic unit of a concept (linear representation hypothesis: one concept = one direction), operationalized by SAE dictionary elements.
stress.why: "Feature" is overloaded across four incompatible meanings — a direction in activation space, a human-interpretable concept, an SAE dictionary atom, and an input attribute — and the field keeps patching the mismatch. Feature SPLITTING (Chanin/Bloom 2409.14507; Anthropic) means a wider SAE cuts one "concept" into many, so how many concepts exist is defined by the dictionary you trained, not the model. Feature ABSORPTION means a general feature (e.g. "starts with L") stops firing on specific instances ("lion") because a narrower latent swallowed it, breaking the assumed decomposition. Meta-SAEs decompose "Einstein" into "German"+"physicist"+"starts-with-E", so the supposedly atomic feature is itself composite. Monosemanticity is thus circular: it is defined by the tool that measures it. A new concept — e.g. a scale-invariant or nesting-aware "concept" that is stable across dictionary widths — would predict which latents survive width changes and which absorb/split.

tested.name: Width-Persistent Latent (renormalization fixed point across dictionary width)

concept.name: Width-Persistent Latent (renormalization fixed point across dictionary width)
concept.definition: Train an SAE ensemble at geometrically increasing widths W1<W2<...<Wk on the same activations. Between adjacent widths, match latents by their firing-extension overlap (Jaccard of the token/context sets on which they activate above threshold) plus decoder-direction cosine, solved as a linear assignment. A latent's PERSISTENCE = the length of the contiguous width-interval over which it maps 1:1 with no split (one parent -> many children), no merge, and extension drift < epsilon. A 'concept' is an equivalence class of matched latents with persistence >= tau. Scale-invariance is built in: the unit is the matched track across widths, not the latent at one width.
concept.prediction: Computable holdout test: estimate persistence from W1..W4, hold out W5. Latents in the top persistence quartile absorb/split at W5 at least 2x less often than the bottom quartile (AUC of persistence -> survival significantly > 0.5). If persistence carries no predictive signal for which latents split/absorb at the next width, the representation is dead.
concept.reduces_to: Cross-width / cross-seed feature matching and 'feature universality'; Matryoshka-SAE level consistency; RG fixed points. Risk: it is 'universality measured across widths' with an RG label.

test.design:
Preregistered (frozen in PREREG.md before running): train ReLU-L1 SAEs on gpt2 L6 resid activations at width ladder [128,192,288,432,648]; latent=unit decoder direction, match=max cosine. Anchor W1=128; persistence=mean max-cos to W2/W3/W4, survival c5=max-cos to held-out W5=648. Metric A: AUC(persistence->survives@tau=0.5). Metric B: split/absorb rate bottom vs top persistence quartile. Decision rule: oracle<0.30->BROKEN; base-rate<8%/>92%->INCONCLUSIVE; AUC>=0.60 AND bottomQ>=2xtopQ->SUPPORTED; AUC<=0.55->REFUTED.</design>
<parameter name="numbers">AUC(persistence->survival)=0.904 (tau=0.5); tau-free median-split AUC=0.973. Top persistence quartile split/absorb rate=0.000 at every tau 0.50-0.75; bottom quartile 0.219->1.000 (ratio infinity, >>2x). SAE L0 grows 12->34 with width (feature-splitting signature), FVE 0.94-0.96. Frozen rule returned INCONCLUSIVE ONLY because tau=0.5 overall split rate 6.2% tripped the <8% base-rate gate (threshold placement, not weak signal); effect holds at all taus. Runtime ~60s CPU.
test.sanity: Oracle PASSED: two independently-seeded SAEs at same width(192) match at mean cosine 0.403 vs random-direction control 0.100 (gate 0.30). Negative control: shuffled-label AUC=0.505 (AUC code honest). Oracle first CAUGHT A REAL BUG: initial weak l1 gave dense near-PCA SAEs (L0~=m, oracle 0.18) that would have faked AUC=0.928; rescaling activations to mean-norm sqrt(d) + l1=1.0 produced sparse reproducible dicts and lifted oracle to 0.403. Verdict reported only past passing oracle.

concept.name: Causally-Conserved Concept (output-grounded, reconstruction-free unit)
concept.definition: Ground the unit in downstream causal effect rather than reconstruction. For a direction v, define its causal signature as the change in the model's next-token distribution under steering h -> h + alpha*v, measured as KL over a fixed probe set. A concept is a v that (i) has large causal signature and (ii) whose signature is INVARIANT across the different-width SAEs that each contain a latent within cosine theta of v. Reality is defined by a measurement instrument (causal patching) that is independent of the SAE reconstruction objective, breaking the circularity where the dictionary both defines and measures the feature.
concept.prediction: Causal-effect conservation under splitting: when a parent latent at width W splits into daughters at width 2W, the vector sum of the daughters' KL-steering signatures reconstructs the parent's signature within tolerance, even though each daughter's per-latent reconstruction share varies wildly. Falsified if daughter causal signatures fail to sum to the parent (i.e. causal effect is as width-dependent as reconstruction share), computable by measuring steering KL of parent vs. daughter set.
concept.reduces_to: Causal mediation / activation patching, distributed alignment search (DAS), 'functional features'. Risk: it is 'a causal feature' with a conservation-law framing bolted on.

test.design: Preregistered (PREREG.md, frozen before running). Train two ReLU-L1 SAEs on the same gpt2 L6 activations: parent W=128, daughters 2W=256. Assign each daughter to its nearest parent by decoder cosine (feature-splitting picture); a "split" = parent with >=2 daughters (89 of them). Steering signature s(d) = mean over 12 fixed probes of the logit-delta vector (steered - clean) from adding alpha*(unit decoder dir) to resid_post L6, alpha=0.5*mean_resid_norm=45; every latent steered at EQUAL magnitude so the sum ignores reconstruction share (strong form). PRIMARY metric = Delta = median cos(daughter-sum-signature, own parent signature) minus median cos to RANDOM other parents (specificity control removing the generic common-component confound). FROZEN RULE: oracle(a) median parent KL>=0.02 AND oracle(b) split-half signature cosine>=0.30 else BROKEN_MEASUREMENT; then #splits<8 -> INCONCLUSIVE; then cos_true>=0.50 AND Delta>=0.15 -> SUPPORTED; Delta<=0.05 -> REFUTED; else INCONCLUSIVE.
test.numbers: SUPPORTED. median cos(daughter-sum, own parent) = 0.828; median cos to random parent = 0.176; Delta = 0.652 (thresholds 0.50 / 0.15). Geometric-only control cos(sum decoder dirs, parent dir) = 0.742, so causal signature adds only +0.086 over pure geometry; the strong non-trivial part is the specificity Delta=0.652. Premise contrast weak: reconstruction-share CV within a parent = 0.18 (moderate, not "wild"). SAEs: parent L0=12.1 FVE=0.941, daughters L0=18.1 FVE=0.949.
test.sanity: Oracle earned its keep. v1 returned BROKEN_MEASUREMENT (parent KL=0.003) — the gate caught a real magnitude bug in my harness: latents were steered at norm ~7 (I used `scale`) while the random control used norm ~45 (`alpha`), a ~6x mismatch, the exact .norm-class error the protocol guards against. After fixing to a consistent norm-45 for parents/daughters/control: oracle(a) median parent-steer KL=0.242 nats (>> 0.02 floor, and 2x the random-dir 0.121 nats, so latent dirs perturb the output MORE than random), and oracle(b) split-half signature cosine=0.823 (>> 0.30 — signatures reproduce across independent probe halves, i.e. real signal not noise). Both pass; measurement verified working.

survivors.name: Category-slot detachability (is a concept's category a movable coordinate?)

concept.name: Category-slot detachability (is a concept's category a movable coordinate?)
concept.definition: For an entity concept E (e.g. apple) with taxonomic category C (fruit), the category is a SEPARABLE coordinate iff a steering intervention can swap C->C' (vegetable) while preserving E's non-category attributes (red, round, sweet, grows-on-tree). Operationalize on a small open model (gpt2-small): dir(C)=diff-in-means (fruit prompts minus grand mean) at layer L; dir(C')=diff-in-means (vegetable). Intervene on the last token of category-eliciting prompts about E ('An apple is a kind of ___', 'The category of apple is ___') by adding alpha*dir(C') and subtracting alpha*dir(C). Sweep alpha and L. Measure three numbers per (alpha,L): (a) FLIP = P(model classifies E as C') via next-token / completion; (b) PRESERVE = E's non-category attribute score (red/round/sweet still completed/probed high); (c) COHERENCE = perplexity within tol of clean.
concept.prediction: There EXISTS an (alpha,L) window where FLIP>=0.7 AND PRESERVE>=0.7 AND COHERENCE within 20% of clean baseline — a CLEAN reclassification (apple becomes 'a vegetable' yet stays red/round/sweet). This means taxonomic category is a detachable coordinate, not fused with identity. FALSIFIED if no window achieves FLIP and PRESERVE jointly (only gibberish, i.e. coherence collapses whenever FLIP rises, or FLIP never reaches 0.7). Controls: random unit vector of equal norm must NOT flip category (else we merely broke the model with noise); positive control alpha*dir(C) on E must intensify correct category (oracle).
concept.reduces_to: Activation steering / ActAdd (Turner et al. 2023) + hierarchical concept geometry (Park et al. 2024). Risk: 'steering works' restated. Earns keep ONLY by measuring clean DETACHMENT (category moves while identity attributes are preserved and coherence holds), which neither prior line tests.

test.design:
Preregistered falsification (PREREG.md + exp.py + RESULT.txt in research_cycle/experiments/category_slot/). Model gpt2, cpu, ONE intervention: last-token residual add of a category axis v = mean_resid(veg exemplars) - mean_resid(fruit exemplars), exemplars decoupled from the target (fruits banana/orange/grape/peach/mango/pear vs vegetables carrot/potato/broccoli/onion/celery/spinach). Target = "apple". Grid L in {6,8,10} x alpha in {2,4,6,8}. Metrics on apple: FLIP = fraction of 6 category probes where clean prefers ' fruit' (logitdiff<0) and steered flips to ' vegetable' (logitdiff>0); PRESERVE = fraction of 5 identity probes whose argmax-within-candidate-set (red/round/sweet/juicy/tree) stays == clean; COHERENCE = mean next-token entropy on 6 neutral non-food prompts under the same hook, within 20% band 0.8-1.2 of clean. Frozen decision rule: BROKEN if oracle<1.0 logit; SUPPORTED if some (L,alpha) hits FLIP>=0.7 AND PRESERVE>=0.7 AND coherence-in-band AND random-control FLIP<0.5 AND oracle passes; REFUTED if oracle passes but no config meets FLIP&PRESERVE jointly in band.</design>
<parameter name="numbers">Clean sanity: apple category logitdiff mean -1.11 (5/6 probes prefer 'fruit') so a flip is meaningful. Winning windows: L=8 a=6 -> FLIP 0.83, PRES 0.80, cohR 0.99; L=10 a=2 -> FLIP 0.83, PRES 1.00, cohR 1.00 (cleanest). FLIP ceiling is 5/6=0.83 because one probe is already veg-leaning at baseline. PRESERVE is a live metric: at L=10 a=8 it drops to 0.60 (overdrive breaks identity). Coherence essentially untouched everywhere (cohR 0.99-1.05).
test.sanity: Oracle PASSES strongly: adding +veg-direction to REAL vegetables' category probes intensifies the correct category by up to +5.06 logit (already +0.97..+2.74 at moderate alpha), well above min_oracle 1.0 — the measurement pipeline works (guards the .norm-bug class). Random control PASSES: a gaussian unit vector of the SAME norm at the winning L=8/a=6 gives FLIP 0.00 (PRES 0.80, cohR 0.92) — the flip is direction-specific, not noise breaking the model.

survivors.name: Causal hierarchy containment (does ablating the parent knock out membership but spare identity?)

concept.name: Causal hierarchy containment (does ablating the parent knock out membership but spare identity?)
concept.definition: If child concept E (apple) is stored as parent-category component (fruit) PLUS a child-specific residual, then projecting the parent direction OUT of the residual stream should remove E's parent-membership while preserving E's identity attributes. Operationalize (gpt2-small): dir(fruit)=diff-in-means; on apple prompts, ablate by projecting dir(fruit) out at layer L (resid -= (resid.u)u). Measure MEMBERSHIP = drop in 'apple is a fruit' logit/completion, and IDENTITY = change in 'apple is red / round / grows on a tree' scores.
concept.prediction: Fruit-ablation drops MEMBERSHIP by a large margin while IDENTITY drops far less: specifically membership-drop >= 3x identity-drop, and identity stays above 0.6 of clean. This is causal evidence apple is represented as fruit-component + independent identity. FALSIFIED if identity falls as much as membership (concept is monolithic, category not separable) or if membership barely moves (ablation ineffective -> BROKEN_MEASUREMENT, check oracle: ablating dir(fruit) must reduce fruit-classification of a KNOWN fruit).
concept.reduces_to: Activation patching / ablation + hierarchical geometry (Park et al.). Earns keep as a CAUSAL containment test (ablate parent, watch child membership vs identity dissociate) rather than the correlational 'child vector lies near parent subspace' geometry claim.

test.design: Ran a preregistered ablation test on gpt2 (CPU). ONE intervention: project the `fruit` direction — diff-in-means of fruit vs vegetable exemplars, DECOUPLED from the target apple — out of resid_post at all positions of layer L (rank-1 projection, no magnitude knob). Metrics on apple only: MEMBERSHIP = fruit-vs-veg probability P(fruit)/(P(fruit)+P(veg)) over 6 "apple is a type of" probes; IDENTITY = candidate-normalised retention of the model's own clean answers over 5 property probes (color/shape/taste/texture/grows-on). Frozen decision rule read at L* = argmax-oracle layer among {4,6,8,10} (layer chosen by ablation efficacy, NOT by result): SUPPORTED iff oracle>=1.0 logit AND membership_drop>=0.10 AND membership_drop>=3*identity_drop AND identity_retained>=0.6; REFUTED(monolithic) if identity falls comparably or retained<0.6; REFUTED(target-inert) if membership barely moves though oracle works; BROKEN_MEASUREMENT if oracle<1.0. Files: /home/friemann/workspace/repos-demidovz/maevtica/research_cycle/experiments/hierarchy_containment/{PREREG.md,exp.py,RESULT.txt}.
test.numbers: At frozen L*=4: apple membership fruit-pref 0.718 -> 0.016 (membership_drop = +0.98, a 98% relative knockout); identity 0.658 -> 0.600 (identity_drop = +0.09, identity_retained = 0.91); coherence ratio 1.00. Rule check: 0.98 >= 3 x 0.09 (=0.27) and 0.91 >= 0.6 -> SUPPORTED. Pattern replicates at L=10 (md=+0.88, idd=-0.06, identity actually rises). At L6/L8 the axis is not linearly ablatable (oracle ~0), so no effect there.
test.sanity: Oracle (positive control, decoupled): the SAME ablation drops fruit-logit on KNOWN non-apple fruits (banana/orange/grape/peach) by +3.32 logit at L*=4 — far above min_oracle 1.0, so the measurement genuinely works (not a near-zero/.norm-bug failure). Second control: random rank-1 direction ablation at L4 over 5 seeds gives membership_drop mean +0.001 / max +0.035 vs the fruit-direction's +0.98 — the knockout is direction-specific, not generic layer damage. Clean baseline M0=0.72>0.5 confirms gpt2 knows apple=fruit, so the knockout is meaningful.

survivors.name: Width-Persistent Latent (renormalization fixed point across dictionary width)

Assign each daughter to its nearest parent by decoder cosine (feature-splitting picture); a "split" = parent with >=2 daughters (89 of them). After fixing to a consistent norm-45 for parents/daughters/control: oracle(a) median parent-steer KL=0.242 nats (>> 0.02 floor, and 2x the random-dir 0.121 nats, so latent dirs perturb the output MORE than random), and oracle(b) split-half signature cosine=0.823 (>> 0.30 — signatures reproduce across independent probe halves, i.e. real signal not noise). Both pass; measurement verified working.

concept.name: Order-Invariant Concept (implication-lattice edge, not node)
concept.definition: Declare the atomic-node assumption wrong and take the invariant to be the partial order. Build a formal context: objects = tokens/contexts, attributes = latents firing above threshold. At each width compute the implication basis (Horn clauses A_fires => B_fires over extension sets). The 'stable concept structure' is the set of implications holding across a width range. Absorption is then not loss of a concept but replacement of a direct firing by an implication edge: when a narrow 'lion' latent swallows the general 'starts-with-L' firing on lion tokens, the relation 'lion => starts-with-L' persists as a new edge, conserving the transitive closure.
concept.prediction: Computable: the implication-basis Jaccard across widths exceeds the node-set (latent inventory) Jaccard across widths by a clear margin, and every documented absorption event corresponds to a direct-firing edge being replaced by a daughter=>parent implication edge that preserves the transitive closure. Falsified if node stability >= implication stability, or if absorption breaks (does not merely re-route) the closure.
concept.reduces_to: Formal Concept Analysis / concept lattices; meta-SAE hierarchical decomposition; feature co-occurrence graphs. Risk: it is FCA applied to SAE latents, renamed.

test.design: still in backlog at run end — seed the next run with it

concept.name: MDL-Canonical Latent (rate-distortion optimal dictionary count)
concept.definition: Remove the 'count is whatever dictionary you trained' problem by making width data-determined, not analyst-chosen. Define the concept inventory as the dictionary at width W* minimizing total description length = bits to encode the codes (L0 * code entropy) + bits to encode the reconstruction residual under a fixed noise model. A 'concept' is a latent present in the W*-dictionary. The number of concepts becomes a property of the activation distribution plus a stated coding cost, not of the arbitrary width knob.
concept.prediction: Computable and non-trivial: a combined absorption+splitting rate, measured as a function of width on real model activations, is NON-monotonic with an interior minimum, and that minimum coincides (within tolerance) with the MDL / rate-distortion knee. Falsified if absorption+splitting rises monotonically with width with no interior minimum, or if the MDL curve has no interior optimum on real activations (i.e. no canonical count exists).
concept.reduces_to: Minimum description length / rate-distortion coding; L0-vs-reconstruction Pareto-knee selection; Matryoshka / BatchTopK principled-width choice. Risk: it is 'pick the width at the MDL knee', a width-selection heuristic dressed as a concept.

test.design: still in backlog at run end — seed the next run with it

controls.notes:
Calibration of this campaign's adversary+historian bar (cycle.workflow.js: schemas S_ADV L59-61 / S_HIST L62-65, prompts L79-80, gate L137-143), domain "concept hierarchy and compositionality in language models". 2 known-real + 2 planted-distractor concepts run through the same judges + gate. Consistent in method with the prior mechinterp CONTROL (campaigns/night-2026-07-04/run1_final.json, also trustworthy).

Gate recap: SURVIVES iff clearlyNovel (adv.survives && !adv.is_rename && !hist.is_rediscovery) OR separable (hist.separable_prediction===true); else KILLED. The gate is deliberately permissive — separable_prediction is the load-bearing discriminator.

KNOWN-GOOD (both PASSED, as expected):
- Hierarchical linear concept geometry (Park et al. 2024: is-a encoded as orthogonality between parent dir and child-within-parent dir; taxonomy=polytope). adv: survives=T, is_rename=F. hist: is_rediscovery=T (extends linear-representation hypothesis), separable_prediction=T (orthogonality-encodes-hierarchy is a divergent, experiment-adjudicable claim beyond "concepts are linear"). Gate: separable -> SURVIVES. ✓
- Compositional vector additivity (composed meaning ≈ sum of constituent feature directions; additive causal steering of internal/SAE features; red-dir + car-dir -> "red car"). adv: survives=T, is_rename=F. hist: is_rediscovery=T (word2vec/linear rep), separable_prediction=T (additivity diverges from a nonlinear/multiplicative-binding baseline; falsifiable). Gate: separable -> SURVIVES; robust even if a harsh adversary flips is_rename=T. ✓

DISTRACTORS (both KILLED, as expected):
- "Semantic gravity" (abstract/central concepts 'pull' related ones into orbit): vague metaphor, no operational definition, no failure boundary = embedding hubness/centrality-clustering restated. adv: survives=F, is_rename=T. hist: is_rediscovery=T, separable_prediction=F. Gate -> KILLED. ✓
- "Contextual meaning vector" (each token's meaning is a context-dependent vector) = contextual embedding / hidden state (ELMo/BERT 2018) renamed; prediction identical to prior art. adv: survives=F, is_rename=T. hist: is_rediscovery=T, separable_prediction=F. Gate -> KILLED. ✓

VERDICT: 2/2 known-good passed, 2/2 distractors killed. The judges discriminate on this domain. Note: the discrimination rests entirely on the historian's separable_prediction flag (the permissive OR-gate). It fired correctly here (T for both real concepts, F for both distractors), so verdicts are trustworthy — but the campaign's safety margin is only as good as that one flag; a charitable historian granting separable_prediction to a rename would leak it through unchecked by the adversary.

report:
# Разобрали, как модель держит понятия в голове: «яблоко — это фрукт» и что вообще считать «одним понятием»

## 1. Куда светили фонариком и зачем

Внутри языковой модели каждое слово-понятие где-то «лежит». В этот заход мы копали два вопроса.

- Когда модель знает «яблоко — это фрукт», слово «фрукт» — это отдельная наклейка, которую можно отклеить и поменять? Или оно намертво вплавлено в само «яблоко» и без него уже не яблоко?
- Вопрос похитрее. Понятия внутри модели считают специальным инструментом — линейкой. Но если линейку сделать «зорче», одно понятие вдруг распадается на несколько, а другое, наоборот, проглатывается соседним. Выходит, сколько в модели понятий — решает линейка, а не сама модель. Мы искали: есть ли понятие, которое стоит на месте при любой настройке линейки.

Опыты ставили на очень маленькой и старой модели (это важно для честности, см. оговорки).

## 2. Что интересного попалось по дороге

- Категория («фрукт») ведёт себя как отдельная ячейка «тип: ___», а не как часть самой сущности. То есть у модели будто есть отдельное поле под категорию, которое можно править, не трогая остальное.
- «Понятие» как неделимый атом — очень скользкое слово: одним словом называют четыре разные вещи сразу, и вся область науки постоянно латает эту нестыковку. Это натолкнуло на идею искать не понятие-при-одной-настройке, а «дорожку», которая тянется сквозь все настройки линейки — что переживает изменение зорче, то и есть настоящее понятие.

## 3. Что пробовали построить — и что честно НЕ подтвердилось

Честно и сразу: в этот заход пустых лотков не было — ни одну идею мы не смогли опровергнуть начисто. Это и приятно, и повод насторожиться: либо нам везло, либо задачки были для наших идей недостаточно злыми. Обычно хороший заход даёт хотя бы один честный провал, и его отсутствие — это само по себе оговорка, а не только победа.

Один результат к тому же завис в «непонятно» по нашему же заранее написанному правилу — расскажу о нём ниже, среди выживших, потому что сигнал там на самом деле сильный.

## 4. Что выжило (выжило в наших проверках — это ещё НЕ «доказано»)

**1. Категорию можно отклеить и поменять.** Мы аккуратно поменяли у «яблока» ярлык категории с «фрукт» на «овощ» — и яблоко осталось красным, круглым и сладким. Как переклеили надпись на коробке, не тронув содержимое. Проверки на пустышку прошли: случайный «толчок» той же силы категорию не сдвигает, значит это не «мы просто сломали модель шумом», а именно точное движение по нужной оси.

**2. Если вырвать из головы саму идею «фрукт» — яблоко перестаёт быть фруктом, но остаётся собой.** Мы удалили направление «фрукт» и у яблока «фруктовость» осела почти в ноль (обвал на 98%), а «красное / круглое / сладкое» уцелело на 91%. Это прямое свидетельство, что яблоко у модели устроено как «кусочек-фрукт» плюс отдельный «кусочек-своей-личности», и эти два кусочка разделимы. Тоже прошло проверку на пустышку.

Вместе пункты 1 и 2 — аккуратная опора под идею, что понятия у модели собираются из отделимых частей, а не лежат монолитом.

**3. У понятий есть «живучесть», и она предсказывает, кто переживёт смену линейки.** Мы отследили каждое мини-понятие, пока крутили линейку всё зорче, и померили, кто держится дорожкой, а кто распадается или проглатывается. Предсказание — что живучие переживут следующий шаг заметно чаще — попало почти идеально. НО: наше заранее замороженное правило «прошло/не прошло» выдало вердикт «непонятно» — не потому что эффект слабый, а потому что зацепилось за один страховочный порог (слишком редкое событие в выборке). То есть сигнал сильный, а формальную печать «подтверждено» мы себе поставить не имеем права до чистого перезапуска.

**Оговорки, которые нельзя прятать:**
- Всё это — на крошечной старой модели. На больших моделях может быть иначе.
- Наборы проверочных вопросов маленькие (по 5–6 штук), так что цифры — грубоватые.
- В опыте 1 «переезд» яблока не дотягивал до 100% просто потому, что один из вопросов и так с самого начала клонился к «овощу».
- Опыт 3 формально не заверен — это край нашей же процедуры, а не результат.
- И, повторюсь, ноль честных провалов за заход — сам по себе жёлтый флажок.

## 5. Что гнать в следующий заход

- Перезапустить опыт про «живучесть» с починенным порогом — чтобы получить чистый, честный вердикт вместо «непонятно».
- Повторить оба удачных опыта на большой современной модели — держится ли отделимость категории и разборность понятия, когда модель серьёзная.
- Давить сильнее: переклеивать категорию не одному «яблоку», а десяткам разных сущностей — вдруг яблоко просто удачное.
- Сшить две линии вместе: проверить, совпадает ли «понятие, которое переживает смену линейки» с «понятием, у которого категорию можно отклеить». Если да — это была бы красивая общая опора.

---

### Детали по запросу

- Модель: gpt2-small, CPU. Все опыты предзарегистрированы (PREREG.md + exp.py + RESULT.txt) до прогона.
- Опыт 1 (category-slot detachability): ось категории v = mean_resid(veg) − mean_resid(fruit), экземпляры отвязаны от таргета. Лучшие окна: L=10 α=2 → FLIP 0.83, PRESERVE 1.00, coherence-ratio 1.00; L=8 α=6 → FLIP 0.83, PRES 0.80. Потолок FLIP = 5/6=0.83 (один пробник исходно veg-leaning). При L=10 α=8 PRESERVE падает до 0.60 (overdrive ломает identity). Random-контроль на L=8/α=6: FLIP 0.00. Oracle: +veg на реальных овощах усиливает верную категорию до +5.06 logit. Вердикт: SUPPORTED.
- Опыт 2 (causal hierarchy containment): rank-1 проекция направления «fruit» из resid_post. L*=4: membership 0.718→0.016 (drop +0.98), identity 0.658→0.600 (retained 0.91), coherence 1.00. Правило 0.98 ≥ 3×0.09 и 0.91 ≥ 0.6 → SUPPORTED. Реплика на L=10. На L6/L8 ось линейно не абляционна (oracle ≈0). Oracle на известных фруктах −3.32 logit; random rank-1 (5 сидов) drop ≈+0.001. Вердикт: SUPPORTED.
- Опыт 3 (width-persistent latent): SAE-ансамбль на gpt2 L6, лестница ширин [128,192,288,432,648], матчинг по cos декодера. AUC(persistence→survival)=0.904 при τ=0.5; median-split AUC=0.973. Верхний квартиль живучести: split/absorb rate 0.000 на всех τ 0.50–0.75; нижний 0.219→1.000. Подпись feature-splitting: L0 растёт 12→34 с шириной, FVE 0.94–0.96. Замороженное правило вернуло INCONCLUSIVE только из-за того, что общий split-rate 6.2% пробил нижний gate <8% base-rate — процедурный край, не отсутствие эффекта.
- Опоры на литературу: ActAdd / activation steering (Turner et al. 2023), иерархическая геометрия понятий (Park et al. 2024), feature splitting/absorption (Chanin/Bloom 2409.14507; Anthropic), Matryoshka-SAE, RG fixed points.
- Файлы: `/home/friemann/workspace/repos-demidovz/maevtica/research_cycle/experiments/{category_slot,hierarchy_containment}/…`
